message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.str ops (6 cases)

Append 6 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.str string accessor
methods:

- str_lower_basic (Mixed Case -> mixed case)
- str_upper_basic
- str_len_basic (including empty string)
- str_strip_basic (whitespace trimming, including \t and \n)
- str_capitalize_basic (only first letter capitalized, rest lowercased)
- str_title_basic (each word's first letter capitalized)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
Series, runs series.str().{op}(), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. SeriesStr* variants were already wired
through the str-method dispatch arm; this fills the live-oracle test
gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-utyc5]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
